data.title: Trump Pardons Nikola Founder Trevor Milton, Short Seller Jim Chanos Reacts: 'Please Tell Me This Is A Hoax'
data.description: Short seller Jim Chanos expressed disbelief Thursday following news that former Nikola Corp. founder Trevor Milton had received a full and unconditional pardon from former President Donald Trump. "Please tell me this is a hoax," Chanos wrote on X, reacting to the decision.

data.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Agrees You Should No Longer Learn To Code, Says Parents Should Advise Their Kids To Focus On These Subjects Instead
data.description: Chamath Palihapitiya predicts engineers will mostly supervise AI within 18 months, urging a shift to humanities-focused skills.
